name: Laura G.
text: I always thought meditating was 'blanking the mind' and it frustrated me. Mayim taught me not to fight with my thoughts.

name: Sophia T.
text: The best investment. My impulsive reactions have decreased noticeably, and my relationship with stress at work changed completely.

name: Andrea R.
text: I felt my mind never stopped. The neuroscience modules opened my eyes. Now I have real tools for my daily life.
